text.title: difficult-conversations Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for difficult-conversations as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Ending the STATE opening with a rhetorical question ("You see that this is a problem, right?") instead of a genuine inquiry.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Rhetorical questions destroy the safety that the rest of STATE was building. The other person reads them as a trap.
